channel.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team
channel.description:
We are excited to introduce our new Developer Relations team formed by **JuanMa Garrido** (@juanma) and **Michael Burridge** (@mburridge). 🎉
JuanMa and Michael will be taking a meaningful role in shaping the experience devs have with Frontity, improving our documentation and creating learning resources for the community, among many other things.
Welcome, folks! We're happy to have you on board!

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
Glad to see the team grow! Welcome @juanma and @mburridge!

Read full topic
item.source: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Thanks @reyes, happy to be on board. Looking forward to working with everyone in the Frontity community.

Read full topic
item.source: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
I’m really happy for this announcement!

Welcome to the team @juanma and @mburridge!

Read full topic
item.source: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Thanks for the introduction @reyes!

And hello everybody!
Yes, Michael and I are at your disposal for any support you need regarding Frontity

You can mention us directly in your post

  • Michael → @mburridge
  • JuanMa → @juanma

and we will be notified about it.

Looking forward to see what you guys build with Frontity

JuanMa

Read full topic
item.source: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our new Developer Relations team

item.description:
We are excited to introduce our new Developer Relations team formed by JuanMa Garrido (@juanma) and Michael Burridge (@mburridge).

JuanMa and Michael will be taking a meaningful role in shaping the experience devs have with Frontity, improving our documentation and creating learning resources for the community, among many other things.

Welcome, folks! We’re happy to have you on board!
